text:
There once was a young girl named Ella who loved bees. She would spend afternoons walking her pet bee, Winnfred. Winnfred liked to go flying. One day, the sky was dark.

"What's up?" Winnfred buzzed.

"There could be a storm," Ella said.

A dark cloud moved overhead.

"What if it rains honey?" she wondered.

"There's plenty to fly away," Winnfred buzzed.

And so they flew. When they landed, they found it wasn vinewood. Butterflies danced. Birds sang.

"Oh lovely!" Ella exclaimed. "That's where we'll take my hive."

They spent the day amongst the flowers. They flew out into the forest. Wind carried their honey home. All summer long, they lived happily ever after.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
